chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-182 of 2024 (Saddam Hussain Maitlo Vs. Public at large) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 771/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2024. Mr. Rameez Hussain Chhajro, advocate for the petitioner. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. The petitioner by way of instant petition has impugned an order dated 26-12-2022 passed by learned IVth Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur, whereby Succession petition filed him was adjourned sine die. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition on merits provided the learned trial Court is directed to dispose of the Succession Petition of the petitioner on merits and in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
